title: Middle Eastern Lamb Kebabs
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish featuring marinated lamb skewers, perfect for a summer evening.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, parsley, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the marinade and mix to coat.
Thread the marinated lamb onto skewers.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the lamb is cooked to your liking.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
